address_note: Corner of Tustin and Katella — Located in the Petco/Michaels Center. Near the 55 freeway.

testimonials.quote: The team at Veterinary Out-Patient Clinic always takes time to explain everything. They helped my dog feel better within hours — and they treated us like family.
testimonials.author: Amanda R., Pet Parent

about_text: Veterinary Out-Patient Clinic (VetOPC) provides affordable pet care for dogs and cats in Orange, CA. We focus on out-patient services, meaning no overnight stays or long waits. Conveniently located near the 55 freeway at the corner of Tustin St & E Katella Avenue.
tagline: Low cost veterinary pet services for dogs and cats
scraping_notes: Only one image found on original Squarespace site (office.jpg). Email hidden in page metadata but extracted: info@VetOPC.com.
